data.title: Press Release: Sanofi’s Cenrifki (tolebrutinib) recommended for EU approval by the CHMP to treat secondary progressive multiple sclerosis without relapses
data.description: Sanofi's drug Cenrifki, also known as tolebrutinib, has been proposed for approval by the Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) in the European Union. This medication is intended to address secondary progressive multiple sclerosis in patients who do not experience relapses. If approved, Cenrifki would provide a new treatment option for individuals affected by this condition. This recommendation follows positive evaluations regarding the drug's safety and efficacy in clinical trials. The approval of Cenrifki could potentially benefit a significant number of patients living with secondary progressive multiple sclerosis throughout the EU.

data.title: ZTO to Announce First Quarter Financial Results on May 19, 2026 U.S. Eastern Time
data.description: On April 24, 2026, ZTO Express (Cayman) Inc., a prominent express delivery firm in China, revealed plans to disclose its unaudited financial outcomes for the initial quarter finishing on March 31, 2026. Traded on NYSE under ZTO and on SEHK under 2057, ZTO is known for its rapid growth within the industry.

data.title: Anthony Scaramucci Questions Bitcoin's Potential Worth As 'Global Requirement' For Cybersecurity
data.description: Anthony Scaramucci, founder of SkyBridge Capital, initiated a discussion on Thursday regarding Bitcoin's potential value as critical cybersecurity infrastructure to combat AI-based threats. He compared Bitcoin's current market value of approximately $1.50 trillion to gold's $30 trillion valuation and posed the question of what Bitcoin could be worth if it becomes a global necessity for cybersecurity against AI attacks. This conversation arose from a tweet where Scaramucci questioned the worth of Bitcoin in this context. Responses varied from predictions of significant market expansion to inquiries about the specific connection between Bitcoin and AI defense. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Jump; Trump Announces New Iran Talks With Hormuz Shut
data.description: Oil prices surged as Iran maintained strict control over the Strait of Hormuz, prompting futures to drop. President Trump revealed plans for fresh discussions on Monday. Investors are anticipating Tesla's upcoming earnings report. This news comes amidst a background of uncertainty in the market, with the Dow Jones experiencing a fall.

data.title: Will S&P 500 Open Up Or Down On April 24?
data.description: The S&P 500 index dropped by 0.41% on Thursday, closing at 7,108.40 after hitting intraday highs. Investors are navigating heightened Iran war risks amidst a positive earnings landscape. Market indicators from Polymarket based in Polygon (CRYPTO: POL) show a bullish lean for Friday, with 62% of traders anticipating an "Up" movement while 38% forecast a lower opening for the benchmark index on April 24. This shift emphasizes the market's sensitivity to Middle East developments, notwithstanding its close proximity to record levels. President Donald Trump's announcement of an extended ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon brought some relief, fueling hopes for reduced regional tensions. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: 15 Press Releases You Need to See This Week
data.description: In recent news, Red Lobster has brought back its popular Endless Shrimp promotion, AbbVie has announced the site for its upcoming manufacturing facility, and Vrbo has revealed its top vacation rentals for the year. Additionally, a review of the week's notable earnings reports and Earth Day developments has been provided. This announcement comes amid a bustling week in New York on April 24, 2026, with numerous media outlets covering the events.

data.title: ACI Worldwide and Kinexys by J.P. Morgan Collaborate to Mitigate Global Real-Time Payments Fraud
data.description: In Omaha, Nebraska, ACI Worldwide (NASDAQ: ACIW) and Kinexys by J.P. Morgan have collaborated to integrate Kinexys Liink’s Confirm application into ACI Worldwide’s Fraud and Financial Crime solution. This integration aims to combat the increasing fraud risks associated with the global acceleration of real-time payments. By embedding account and payee verification directly into payment workflows, banks can enhance security measures, lessen fraud occurrences, safeguard customers, and promote secure and efficient payments on a large scale. The joint effort seeks to support the adoption of real-time payments while prioritizing safety and speed in transactions.

data.title: Maple and Quantic Partner to Bring AI Phone Ordering to Thousands of Restaurants
data.description: Maple, a top voice AI platform for restaurants, and Quantic POS, a cloud-based point-of-sale provider for restaurants and retail, have joined forces in a strategic partnership. The collaboration aims to introduce automated phone ordering to Quantic's restaurant clientele. This integration tackles the common issue of missed phone calls and resulting revenue loss experienced by restaurant operators. According to industry statistics, restaurants typically miss out on revenue from 21% to 4% of incoming calls.

data.title: SkyDrive and West Nippon Expressway Company sign Partnership Agreement on Advanced Air Mobility
data.description: A Japanese eVTOL aircraft manufacturer, SkyDrive Inc., has partnered with West Nippon Expressway Company (NEXCO West) to explore the potential for advanced air mobility services at expressway parking and service areas. The partnership aims to investigate the commercial viability of eVTOL services. SkyDrive, focused on revolutionizing mobility, is leading this effort.

data.title: VEON’s Banglalink to Bring Starlink Mobile to Customers in Bangladesh
data.description: VEON and Starlink Mobile have formed a partnership to provide direct-to-device satellite connectivity to users in Bangladesh, making it the third market to have access to this technology. This collaboration aims to enhance connectivity for users in remote areas where traditional networks may be unavailable or unreliable. The partnership underscores the commitment to expanding access to reliable communication services, with Bangladesh joining two other markets that have already benefited from this partnership.

data.title: Tech can enable older adults to age at home, addressing caregiving gaps as America ages rapidly.
data.description: The emerging industry is making aspirations come true for elderly individuals who wish to remain in their own homes, addressing caregiving shortages and providing peace of mind as the aging population in America rapidly increases.

data.title: Elizabeth Moellering Named General Counsel and Corporate Secretary of Maximus
data.description: Elizabeth Moellering has been appointed as the new General Counsel and Corporate Secretary of Maximus, a company based in Tysons, Virginia. This appointment comes as a strategic move for the company to strengthen its legal team. Maximus is a prominent organization known for its work in the industry.

data.title: Trump criticizes prediction markets, calling the world a 'casino' as soldier faces charges over $X bets on Polymarket on Maduro's fate.
data.description: The President of the United States expressed his lack of enthusiasm for prediction markets, stating that he had never been a strong supporter of them. This statement comes in light of a recent insider trading case, which underscored the potential risks associated with such markets.

data.title: New Data Demonstrate Safety and Effectiveness of Bridge to Life's VitaSmart Hypothermic Oxygenated Machine Perfusion (HOPE) System in Partial Graft Pediatric Liver Transplantation
data.description: Research findings were discussed during an oral presentation at the 30th Annual Meeting of the Society of Pediatric Liver Transplantation (SPLIT), a division of The Transplantation Society (TTS). The study revealed promising results on the use of HOPE in pediatric liver transplantation. Further abstracts presented at the event also provided additional evidence supporting the benefits of using HOPE in these procedures. This information was shared in Duluth, Georgia, on April 24, 2026.

data.title: Lanvin Group to Report 2025 Full-Year Audited Results on April 30, 2026
data.description: Luxury fashion group Lanvin Group (NYSE: LANV) will unveil its audited full-year 2025 results on April 30, 2026. This event will take place at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Daylight Time and 8:00 p.m. China Standard Time.
